case_title: ROBERT JOHN REIBER et al VS. GREAT HIGHWAY, LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,250.00 FILED BY REIBER, ROBERT JOHN O'DANIEL, TIMOTHY MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT GREAT HIGHWAY, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
